章节结构.核心任务: 确立研究领域（Establishing a Territory），介绍宏观背景，强调研究问题在现实应用或理论发展中的重要性与紧迫性。

章节结构.子节名称: 现有挑战与研究缺口 (Challenges & Research Gap)
章节结构.核心任务: 确立研究利基（Establishing a Niche），回顾现有方法或技术，通过分类和对比指出其固有局限性，明确当前尚未解决的核心问题或研究空白。

章节结构.子节名称: 本文方法与核心贡献 (Proposed Method & Contributions)
章节结构.核心任务: 占据研究利基（Occupying the Niche），提出本文的创新解决方案或策略，概述方法的核心机制，并以列表形式明确列出本文的主要贡献。

Introduction.内容逻辑: 采用经典的“倒金字塔（漏斗型）”逻辑结构，即“宏观背景引入 -> 中观问题聚焦 -> 微观方案提出”。各子节之间通过强烈的转折逻辑（如However, Unfortunately, Despite）实现从“理想现状”到“缺陷挑战”的过渡；通过目的与动作逻辑（如In this paper, To this end, Purposely）实现从“问题”到“解决方案”的过渡。整体呈现出层层递进、破立结合的严密论证链条。
论证手法: 数据与文献支撑：使用具体统计数据（如'accounting for approximately one-third'）和密集引用证明背景的紧迫性和现有研究的广泛性。
对比与分类论证：对现有技术进行分类对比（如'intrusive vs. semi-intrusive vs. non-invasive'，'Lambertian vs. non-Lambertian'），层层剥茧地暴露出各类方法的固有缺陷。
实例与场景具象化：通过生活或工程中的具体实例（如'glass windows of buildings', 'glass door'）将抽象的学术问题转化为直观的物理挑战，增强代入感。
视觉证据辅助（图表引用）：在Introduction中直接引用对比图（如Figure 1），通过视觉上的'failure cases'（伪影、错误深度）直观证明现有方法的失效和本文方法的有效性。

研究背景与动机.核心句式: In [context/society/daily lives], [phenomenon/problem] is/are [adjective] challenges / we often interact with [objects].
研究背景与动机.原文示例: In modern society, global climate change and energy scarcity are increasingly acute challenges.

现有挑战与研究缺口.核心句式: However/Unfortunately, most current [methods/systems] [limitation], making them [negative consequence] / Despite this, [problem remains].
现有挑战与研究缺口.原文示例: However, most current depth estimation methods support only Lambertian scenes, making them unreliable for glossy surfaces.

本文方法与核心贡献.核心句式: In this paper, we present/propose a [method/strategy] that [action] / Our main contributions are: 1)... 2)...
本文方法与核心贡献.原文示例: In this paper, we present a depth and reflectance estimation algorithm that explicitly models spatially varying BRDFs from light-field cameras.

章节结构.子节名称: 核心任务的主流方法 (如 Depth from Light-Field Cameras / Monocular Depth Estimation / Stereo Matching)
章节结构.核心任务: 梳理解决本文核心问题（如深度估计）的主流技术演进，指出其在特定场景（如非朗伯体、透明/镜面表面）下的局限性，确立研究起点。

章节结构.子节名称: 密切相关的理论基础或对比方法 (如 Differential Motion Theory)
章节结构.核心任务: 深入对比本文所依赖或改进的特定理论/算法，明确本文在假设、公式推导或适用性上的具体差异，凸显理论创新。

章节结构.子节名称: 相关子领域或联合任务方法 (如 BRDF Estimation / Shape from Shading)
章节结构.核心任务: 回顾与本文次要目标或辅助任务相关的领域，说明现有方法为何不能直接迁移或应用于本文的特定硬件设定（如光场相机）。

章节结构.子节名称: 特定场景的数据集或感知任务 (如 Non-Lambertian Object Perception)
章节结构.核心任务: 总结针对本文特定难点（如透明/镜面物体）的现有数据集或感知工作，强调数据获取的困难或现有标注的缺失，凸显本文贡献的实际价值。

Related Work.内容逻辑: 各子节之间呈现“从宏观到微观、从通用到特定、从方法到数据”的漏斗型逻辑关系。首先回顾解决核心任务的通用主流方法，指出其在本文特定场景下的失效；接着深入到与本文最密切相关的理论基础或具体算法，进行细致的差异对比以凸显理论创新；然后扩展到相关的联合任务或子领域，排除直接迁移现有方法的可能性；最后落脚于特定场景的数据集或感知现状，从数据或应用层面论证本文研究的必要性和动机。过渡方式通常通过“指出前一子节方法的局限性”自然引出“下一子节相关方法的尝试与不足”，最终所有子节的“不足”共同汇聚成本文的“研究动机（Gap）”。
论证手法: 对比论证 (Contrast)：将现有方法的假设/能力与本文方法进行直接对比，突出本文的优越性或差异性。
指出局限/缺陷 (Limitation Pointing)：明确指出现有方法在特定条件（如非朗伯体、特定材质）下的失效或假设的不合理性。
分类归纳 (Categorization)：将大量文献按技术路线、架构设计或模型类型进行分类梳理，使综述更具条理性。
数据/事实支撑 (Fact/Data Support)：列举现有数据集的规模、标注类型或获取成本，用客观事实证明材料获取或标注的难度。
溯源与演进 (Evolution Tracing)：描述某项技术从早期传统方法到最新深度学习架构的发展脉络，展现领域全貌。

核心任务的主流方法.技术演进句式: 模板：Early methods used [技术A] for [任务]. More recent approaches such as [方法B, C] use [技术D] and leverage [优势]. | 原文示例：Early methods used CNNs for pixel-level regression. More recent approaches such as AdaBins, DPT, and MiDaS use adaptive bins and vision transformers...
核心任务的主流方法.指出局限句式: 模板：Except for some works that address [特定问题] using [方法], to the best of our knowledge, we are not aware of any previous [领域] network that can handle [本文难点]. | 原文示例：Except for some works that address non-Lambertian depth estimation using depth completion approaches..., to the best of our knowledge, we are not aware of any previous single-view depth estimation network that can handle ToM surfaces.

密切相关的理论基础或对比方法.差异对比句式: 模板：Our work has [数字] major differences. First, in contrast to [对比方法] which [对比方法特点], we [本文特点]. | 原文示例：Our work has three major differences. First, in contrast to the differential motions he uses, which contain both translations and rotations, we only have translations in light-field cameras.
密切相关的理论基础或对比方法.假设突破句式: 模板：Second, the work by [作者] then assumes [原有假设] to [原有目的]. In contrast, for our [本文设定], we must account for [本文考虑因素]. | 原文示例：Second, the work by Chandraker then assumes a constant viewing direction... In contrast, for our purely translational light-field setup, we must account for viewpoint variations.

相关子领域或联合任务方法.分类列举句式: 模板：[任务] has been studied for many years and different models have been proposed. [类别A] models can achieve [优点]. [类别B] and [类别C] methods are also popular, but rely on [缺点]. | 原文示例：BRDF estimation has been studied for many years and different models have been proposed. Parametric models can achieve good accuracy... Non-parametric and data-driven methods are also popular, but rely on complex estimation...
相关子领域或联合任务方法.排除适用性句式: 模板：None of these methods tries to recover [目标] using [本文手段], and the techniques are not intended for [本文设备/场景]. | 原文示例：None of these methods tries to recover shape or reflectance using camera motions, and the techniques are not intended for light-field cameras.

特定场景的数据集或感知任务.数据集列举与缺陷句式: 模板：[数据集A] and [数据集B] consist of [数量] images of [对象]. Both datasets provide [已有标注], though none of them provide [缺失标注/本文所需]. | 原文示例：Trans10K and MSD consist of over 10 000 and 4 000 real in-the-wild images... Both datasets provide manually annotated segmentations of ToM materials, though none of them provide depth labels.
特定场景的数据集或感知任务.强调困难句式: 模板：Obtaining [所需数据/标签] for these kinds of datasets is expensive, challenging, and time-consuming since it requires [困难原因]. | 原文示例：Obtaining depth labels for these kinds of datasets is expensive, challenging, and time-consuming since it requires eithe[r]...

章节结构.核心任务: 介绍整体模型架构（两阶段跨域迁移学习框架），明确要解决的核心挑战（红外数据稀缺/小样本条件下的检测），并高度概括核心原理。

章节结构.子节名称: Stage 1: Source Domain Pre-training (第一阶段：源域预训练)
章节结构.核心任务: 详细阐述在大规模可见光数据集上预训练特征提取和检测架构的具体网络设计、数据流及训练过程。

章节结构.子节名称: Stage 2: Cross-domain Transfer and Adaptation (第二阶段：跨域迁移与自适应)
章节结构.核心任务: 详细说明将视觉信息迁移到红外域的独特迁移学习策略，包括冻结CNN主干网络、Transformer编解码器参数共享以及仅微调前馈神经网络（FFNs）的具体实现机制。

Methodology.内容逻辑: 采用典型的“总-分”与“时序/流程”相结合的逻辑结构。首先通过Overview进行全局统筹，点明研究动机（解决红外数据稀缺）和整体方案（两阶段迁移学习）；随后按照模型训练的时间顺序和数据处理流程，从“源域预训练（可见光）”自然过渡到“目标域迁移（红外）”。各子节之间通过“pre-training... then transferring...”的时序逻辑和因果逻辑（为了解决数据稀缺，所以采用特定的参数冻结与共享策略）进行平滑过渡。
论证手法: 目标导向论证：通过明确指出面临的挑战（infrared data scarcity / few-shot learning conditions），论证采用跨域迁移学习框架的必要性和合理性。
机制拆解说明：将复杂的迁移学习过程拆解为具体的操作组合（freezing CNN + parameter sharing + fine-tuning FFNs），通过清晰的机制设计来证明方法的高效性（efficient domain adaptation）。
对比与条件设定：通过对比源域（large-scale visible-light datasets）与目标域（infrared domain under data scarcity），凸显迁移学习在数据分布和规模差异下的关键作用。

Framework Overview.核心句式: [Model Name] employs a [framework type], aiming to address the challenge of [specific task] under [specific condition/constraint].
Framework Overview.原文示例: TLA-DETR employs a two-stage cross-domain transfer learning framework, aiming to address the challenge of efficient detection and location of indoor thermal adaptation behaviors under infrared data scarcity (few-shot learning conditions).

Core Principle / Methodology Flow.核心句式: Its core principle involves [action 1] on [dataset/domain 1], then [action 2] to [dataset/domain 2] through [specific technique/strategy] to achieve [ultimate goal].
Core Principle / Methodology Flow.原文示例: Its core principle involves pre-training a robust feature extraction and detection architecture on large-scale visible-light datasets, then transferring visual information to the infrared domain through a unique transfer learning trick (freezing the CNN backbone + parameter sharing of the Transformer encoder/decoder + fine-tuning only the FFNs) to achieve efficient domain adaptation.

章节结构.子节名称: 实验设置与参数选择 (Experimental Setup & Parameter Selection)
章节结构.核心任务: 介绍使用的数据集（公开与合成）、评估指标、网络超参数选择依据以及消融实验的初步设计，为后续评估奠定基准。

章节结构.子节名称: 主实验结果评估 (Main Results Evaluation)
章节结构.核心任务: 在标准数据集和特定场景（如透明物体）下，通过定量指标和定性可视化对比，证明提出方法的整体优越性（SOTA）。

章节结构.子节名称: 鲁棒性与敏感性分析 (Robustness and Sensitivity Analysis)
章节结构.核心任务: 通过控制变量实验（如改变透明度），探究算法在极端或不同物理条件下的表现极限、优势及局限性。
验证网络中特定模块（如双分支结构、自适应模块）的有效性和必要性，解释模型设计的合理性。

Experiments.内容逻辑: 整体遵循“基础准备 -> 核心验证 -> 深入剖析”的递进逻辑。首先通过“实验设置”交代数据、指标和参数，确立评估标准；接着进入“主实验结果”，从定量和定性两个维度全面展示方法相较于现有SOTA的优势，确立核心贡献；随后通过“鲁棒性分析”和“消融实验”进行下沉，利用控制变量和模块剥离，深入解释模型“为什么有效”以及“在何种边界条件下失效”。各子节间通常通过小标题直接切换，或使用“In addition to...”等递进连词实现平滑过渡。
论证手法: 数据支撑：使用MSE、BadPix等客观定量指标（如Tab. I）直接证明深度估计的精度提升。
可视化对比：展示深度估计图和误差图（Error maps，如Fig. 6, Fig. 7），直观证明边缘连续性、伪影消除及多层场景分离效果。
对比论证：与现有传统方法（如Distg., OACC）及深度学习方法进行横向对比，突出本方法在非朗伯体（Non-Lambertian）场景下的独特优势。
控制变量法：固定其他条件，单一改变特定物理属性（如透明度从100%降至20%），测试算法的感知极限。
举例剖析：针对特定困难场景（如Teddy中外观相似的边界、David中低透明度背景）进行具体的Case Study，增强结论的说服力。

关键句式模板.参数与设置: 模板：Since there are adjustable parameters in [Method], we list the most important optimal parameter selections. / 原文示例：Since there are adjustable parameters in ACO, we list the three most important optimal parameter selections.
关键句式模板.数据集介绍: 模板：We used the class “[Class]” in [Dataset] with test image “[Image]” for quantitative evaluation. / 原文示例：We used the class “Transparency” in 4D light field benchmark [11] with test image “Moria” for quantitative evaluation.
关键句式模板.定量结果声明: 模板：The proposed [Method] achieves state-of-the-art depth accuracy in terms of the average [Metric] and [Metric] scores on both the public dataset and generated data. / 原文示例：The proposed ACO achieves state-of-the-art depth accuracy in terms of the average MSE and BadPix scores on both the public dataset and generated data.
关键句式模板.定性结果分析: 模板：Fig. [X] shows estimation results and error maps... At the edges of [Object], our algorithm achieves good [Property]. / 原文示例：Fig. 6 shows estimation results and error maps... At the edges of transparent objects, our algorithm achieves good depth continuity.
关键句式模板.对比与局限性探讨: 模板：In addition, [Baseline methods] perform well when [Condition], but suffer from [Problem]. As aforementioned in Sec. [X], this is a limitation of... / 原文示例：In addition, deep learning methods perform well when the testing data shares a similar distribution with the train data, but suffer from generalization problems.
关键句式模板.敏感性/控制变量分析: 模板：In addition to the comparison on public datasets, in order to explore the sensitivity of the algorithms to [Factor], we conduct a control variable experiment... / 原文示例：In addition to the comparison on public datasets, in order to explore the sensitivity of the algorithms to transparency, we conduct a control variable experiment on the data David with different transparency.

章节结构.子节名称: 研究总结与核心贡献 (Summary of Work and Core Contributions)
章节结构.核心任务: 重申研究背景与动机，高度概括本文提出的核心方法、模型框架、数据集或理论创新，奠定结论的基调。

章节结构.子节名称: 实验验证与主要发现 (Experimental Validation and Key Findings)
章节结构.核心任务: 概述实验设置与验证结果，强调模型性能、对比优势以及研究结论的科学价值或实际应用意义。

章节结构.子节名称: 局限性与未来工作 (Limitations and Future Work)
章节结构.核心任务: 客观指出当前研究在数据规模、应用场景、理论推导或方法设计上的局限性，并据此提出具体的未来改进方向或拓展计划。

Conclusion.内容逻辑: 整体呈现“回顾已完成工作 -> 评价工作成效 -> 展望未来研究”的递进式逻辑。首先通过“总起”重申核心贡献；接着通过“分述”列举实验验证和具体发现，证明方法的有效性；最后通过“转折与延伸”指出当前研究的边界，顺理成章地引出未来工作。在过渡方式上，从总结到实验通常使用“Experiments validate...”等客观陈述自然衔接；从实验到未来工作则常通过“Finally, since...”、“A promising future direction...”或直接陈述当前局限“The current validation is based on...”来实现语意的转折与升华。
论证手法: 概括重述法：高度凝练地重述方法和结果，不引入正文中未提及的新细节或新数据，保持结论的简洁性。
对比论证法：通过与现有基线或传统方法对比，突出本文方法的独特优势（如“while this is not possible using [5, 6, 7]”）。
事实与数据支撑法：提及具体的数据集名称、类别数量或设备型号以增强结论的客观性和可信度（如“26-category”、“MERL dataset”、“Lytro Illum”）。
因果推导法：基于当前研究发现的理论模糊性或实验局限性，逻辑推导出未来的研究方向（如“since we showed that there is actually inherent ambiguity... future work includes...”）。

研究总结与核心贡献.模板: In this paper, we propose a novel [method] for [task] from [data/source].
研究总结与核心贡献.原文示例: In this paper, we propose a novel BRDF-invariant shape and reflectance estimation method for glossy surfaces from light-field cameras.

研究总结与核心贡献.模板: To address the core requirements for [problem], this work constructs [dataset], proposes and validates [model] – a framework for [task].
研究总结与核心贡献.原文示例: To address the core requirements for intelligent detection of human thermal comfort in indoor building environments, this work constructs TABD, proposes and validates TLA-DETR – a framework for identifying and locating human thermal adaptation behaviors based on infrared data.

实验验证与主要发现.模板: Experiments validate our algorithm on [datasets], as well as real-world data taken with [equipment].
实验验证与主要发现.原文示例: Experiments validate our algorithm on most material types in the MERL dataset, as well as real-world data taken with the Lytro Illum.

实验验证与主要发现.模板: A series of experiments conducted on [dataset] validate the superiority of [model] across multiple dimensions.
实验验证与主要发现.原文示例: A series of experiments conducted on TABD validate the superiority of TLA-DETR across multiple dimensions.

局限性与未来工作.模板: Finally, since we showed that [limitation/finding], future work includes [future task].
局限性与未来工作.原文示例: Finally, since we showed that there is actually inherent ambiguity in light-fields for unknown shape and general multi-lobe reflectance, future work includes deriving its ambiguity-space...

局限性与未来工作.模板: The current validation is based on [limitation]. We will consider [factors] to ensure robust performance across [scenarios], and strive to explore broader applications...
局限性与未来工作.原文示例: The current validation is based on a limited participant group and a single building context. We will consider individual differences and environmental diversity to ensure robust performance across varied building scenarios, and strive to explore broader applications of TLA-DETR...
